title: Performancify
description: The Performancify is a lightweight modpack aims to provide the best optimization mods available, configured for the maximum performance achievable. It often outperforms other optimization modpacks in benchmarks.
body:
# **Performancify** - **The Ultimate Optimsed Minecraft Modpack**

 The Performancify is a lightweight modpack aims to provide the best optimization mods available, configured for the maximum performance achievable. It often outperforms other optimization modpacks in benchmarks, and when it doesn't, I will try my best to update them. It recieves fast 
updates. It has no extra visual mods. Only mods added for pure performance, you can add other non-optimization mods yourself.

### **Loaders**
Performancify is powered by Fabric, an innovative modding toolchain for Minecraft, designed for maximum efficiency and flexibility.

 ✧╭･❥︙・**Included Mods**                                                                  
      🔹Sodium                                               
      🔹Lithium                                    
      🔹Iris                                                 
      🔹Ferrite Core                                            
      🔹C2me                                                               
      🔹Modernfix                                            
      🔹Krypton                                                        
      🔹MoreCulling                                                               
      🔹DynamicFPS                                                              
      🔹Immediately Fast                                                               
      🔹Bad Optimizations                                                             
      🔹Resourcify                                                                       
      🔹Gamma Utils                                                                                 
      🔹Mod Menu                                                                          

 There are many more mods added for a lag-free experience
